parsed_review.summary: CP00-652 (RP21 Admin Console fixture/golden-case descriptor, risk C, 150 units, RP21.P04.M06.S16-RP21.P05.M05.S13) passes independent read-only review. Baseline is consistent across registry.js binding, manifest plan-binding snapshot, closeout-pack-plan.json live_state, and next-pack-queue.json (upstream CP00-651, next CP00-653/RP21.P05.M05.S14); deliverable and micro-title distributions match the pack baseline exactly. The implementation is strictly descriptor-only: createAdminConsoleCp652FixtureGoldenCaseSet/Descriptor produce rows with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false, and freezeCp652Result pins no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false and every mutation/permission/audit/persistence/runtime flag false. validators.js enforces ~36 false-flags, the required no-leak guards, no-payload fixture contract, no-runtime-receipt test-evidence contract, correct handoff targets, and explicitly forbids promoting Claude to final approval. Tests load the committed contract and deep-compare it to the freshly generated projection, run coverage + descriptor validation, and assert closed runtime boundaries, read-only evidence packets, and the CP00-653 handoff. command-evidence.json shows all 23 commands (incl. npm test, npm run build, full validation matrix, git diff --check) exiting 0 with no_real_data=true. CP178+ review hardening is intact: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, non-empty valid-JSON stdout), tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, schema present. The pack does not overclaim — production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, Hermes emits no runtime receipts, and enterprise-trust/human final approval remain outside this receipt. The descriptor-verified closeout claim is fully supported and all no-write/no-real-data/read-only boundaries hold. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
